lint.output: 1 pre-existing warning in flow-canvas.tsx (addEdge unused) — documented in LEARNINGS.md. No new warnings.

notes: All acceptance criteria met with one deviation: For deploying starter templates, the task spec said 'call createTemplate first (saves to DB), then deployTemplate'. However, POST /api/v1/templates requires section_id (server-side validation returns 400 without it) — there is no path to save a pre-built TemplateData JSONB blob without a real DB section. client.ts is read-only. Rather than leaving starters non-deployable, starters are deployed directly via createSection + createStep calls (functionally equivalent to what the deploy route does internally). DB templates still use the standard deployTemplate() path. Template browser dialog is inline in canvas-view.tsx (not extracted to separate file) — total file size stays manageable.
